    testCreateVariantsWizard()
    Ensures that several variants can be created at the same time.
    void
    testCreateVariantWizard()
    Ensures that a variant can be created with specific attribute values.
    void
    testCreateVariantWizardDefaults()
    Ensures that a variant can be created with default attribute values.
    void
    testDeleteElement()
    ensures that an element is deleted when execute and redo operation.
    ensures that the deleted element is created and that the orders is kept when undo
    void
    testDeleteElementMultiple()
    ensures that elements are deleted when execute and redo operation.
    ensures that all deleted elements are created and that the orders is kept when undo
    void
    testDeleteElementWithChild()
    ensures that an element is deleted when execute and redo operation.
    ensures that the deleted element is created, including its child.
    void
    testMove1()
    ensures that the first element is move down when execute and redo
    ensures that the first element is still the first after undo
    void
    testMove2()
    ensures that the last element is move before the first when execute and redo
    ensures that the last element is still the last after undo
    void
    testMove3()
    Ensures that move operation is well executed, undone, and redone for an element which parent is not the component root.
    void
    testMove4()
    Ensures that move operation also renames elements to avoid name collision.
    void
    testRenameElements()
    ensures that prefix of elements with the same type is renamed
    ensures others elements are not renamed
